name: Neela's Eggplant and Potato - Madhur Jaffrey
recipeIngredient: 1 cup peeled diced boiling potatoes (1/2-inch cubes)
recipeInstructions:
Note: 4 tablespoons of oil is sufficient for a doubled recipe.
1. Prepare the pots and eggplant.
2. Begin cooking the rice.
3. Complete the rest of the ingredient preparation.
4. Heat the oil in an 8- to 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat (or use a wok when doubling).
5. Once the oil is hot, add the mustard seeds. As soon as they begin to pop (which takes just a few seconds), add the potatoes and eggplant.
6. Stir once.
7. Add the coriander, cumin, turmeric, cayenne, and salt. Stir and fry for about one minute.
8. Pour in 3 tablespoons of water, then cover with a tight-fitting lid.
9. Turn the heat to low and simmer gently for 10 to 15 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender. Stir occasionally.
10. If the vegetables stick at the bottom of the skillet, add another tablespoon of water.
11. Garnish with a tablespoon of minced Chinese parsley, if desired.
